MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-04-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT VINCENT QUAKENBUSH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
